query:
SELECT
                    e.source_id AS section_id,
                    e.target_id AS paragraph_id,
                    c.content,
                    c.truth_value
                FROM edges e
                JOIN claims c ON c.id = e.target_id
                WHERE e.source_id = ANY($1)
                  AND e.relationship = 'decomposes_to'
                  AND (c.properties->>'level')::int = 2
